However, this breaks hot reload:\n- When Display attributes are changed during development, `ExpressionMemberAccessor` clears its static caches\n- If the expression reference stays the same, the component never calls `GetDisplayName()` to refresh from the cleared cache\n- Result: Stale display names are shown after hot reload\n\n**Fix:**\nRemove the optimization and always call `GetDisplayName()`, but still only re-render if the value actually changed.
